pull_request.title: Add type annotations and mypy support
pull_request.body:
## Summary

- Add `py.typed` marker file (PEP 561) declaring the package as typed
- Add `[tool.mypy]` configuration to `pyproject.toml` (Python 3.9, `ignore_missing_imports`, images subpackage excluded)
- Add `typing` target to `Makefile` running `mypy metakernel/`
- Add type annotations across all 94 source files using `from __future__ import annotations` and `Optional`/`Any`/`dict` hints
- All files pass `mypy metakernel/` with zero errors; all 80 tests continue to pass

## Bug fixes uncovered by typing

- `_metakernel.py`: `for k, v in kwargs` → `for k, v in kwargs.items()` (was iterating keys, not pairs)
- `process_metakernel.py`: `DynamicKernel.makeWrapper()` passed `prompt_cmd=` but `REPLWrapper.__init__` takes `prompt_emit_cmd=`
- `blockly_magic.py`: undefined `html_from_local` → `page_from_local`
- `tutor_magic.py`, `download_magic.py`, `install_magic_magic.py`, `jigsaw_magic.py`, `test_expect.py`: removed Python 2 `urllib`/`xrange` remnants

commit_summaries.message:
Add type annotations and mypy configuration

- Add py.typed marker file (PEP 561)
- Add mypy configuration to pyproject.toml with python_version=3.9
- Add `typing` target to Makefile running `mypy metakernel/`
- Annotate core modules: _metakernel, process_metakernel, magic, parser,
  pexpect, replwrap, display
- Annotate all magics with from __future__ import annotations and
  Optional/Any/dict type hints
- Fix several real bugs found during typing:
  - kwargs iteration bug (for k,v in kwargs → kwargs.items())
  - DynamicKernel prompt_cmd → prompt_emit_cmd parameter name
  - blockly_magic html_from_local → page_from_local undefined variable
  - Replace Python 2 urllib/xrange remnants with Python 3 equivalents
- All 94 source files pass mypy with no errors
